title: disteganthus lateralis
intro: Disteganthus lateralis is a plant species that belongs to the family Apocynaceae and is native to tropical regions of Asia and Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Disteganthus lateralis include its ability to aid in the treatment of skin conditions, wounds, and infections, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of Disteganthus lateralis can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to the affected area for therapeutic benefits.
